title: Workshop: Build a Cooling-Center Appointment Form
summary: Workshop: Build a Cooling-Center Appointment Form retrieves prior skills in an original multi-state community cooling appointment workflow scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css action pseudo classes, css structural pseudo classes, css form state pseudo classes, css functional pseudo classes, css pseudo elements in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real multi-state community cooling appointment workflow artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
